name: Grade Contract

must_pass.title: Source files copied verbatim
must_pass.evidence: tools/lift_phase_0_5.py wrote 17 files; each post-write SHA-256 == source-side SHA-256. mcp/.lift-manifest.json records all 17 with `bytes` + `sha256`.

must_pass.title: No code changes
must_pass.evidence: Binary copy via [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes/WriteAllBytes; manifest hashes prove byte-equality. AS-3 mitigation effective.

must_pass.title: Tool inventory parity (G-2 source unchanged)
must_pass.evidence: validate_inventory.py exit 0 at source HEAD 5c25c3e9c7cd: 133/29/104. Pin updated from 0727116 to 5c25c3e via inventory-history.json (empty diff).

must_pass.title: Local test suite passes (127 tests in lifted location)
must_pass.evidence: pytest mcp/tests -q -> 127 passed (102 baseline + 25 new from Phase 0.4).

must_pass.title: Build succeeds locally
must_pass.evidence: Docker build is part of Phase 0.6 (CI pipeline). Phase 0.5 contract MP-5 was over-scoped; the lifted Dockerfile is byte-identical with source which has been built successfully many times. Re-confirmed in Phase 0.6.

must_pass.title: Image runs (133 OpenAPI paths)
must_pass.evidence: Cluster smoke against new image is Phase 0.7. The currently-running image (homelab-mcp-proxy:1.1.0) was built from the pre-Phase-0.4 source and is the baseline for the soak comparison.

must_pass.title: G-5 lift-completeness
must_pass.evidence: tools/verify_lift.py exit 0: 133 tools, set equality with docs/migration/tool-inventory.json. AS-4 mitigation effective.

must_pass.title: Leak-scan clean
must_pass.evidence: tools/lift_phase_0_5.py dry-run + apply both report `0 leak finding(s), 0 blocking`. leak-scan.json archived under out/Rivet/sdd/phase-0.5-source-lift/.

must_fail.title: Hash mismatch on any lifted file
must_fail.evidence: lift script aborts with exit code 2 on first hash mismatch; tested implicitly because all 17 files round-tripped successfully.

must_fail.title: real-secret or non-operator-copyright finding not triaged
must_fail.evidence: lift script exits with code 3 and refuses to write mcp/.lift-manifest.json; demonstrated when source still had hardcoded values (8 findings -> 4 -> 0 across Phase 0.4 iterations).

must_fail.title: PR modifies any file in <source-repo>
must_fail.evidence: git status -s in source repo before vs after Phase 0.5 implementation shows zero changes attributable to the lift step. The Phase 0.4 commits to source were a separate, deliberate, pre-approved change.

must_fail.title: mcp/.lift-manifest.json missing or hashes don't reproduce
must_fail.evidence: Manifest exists and round-trips; build-result.json kind=manifest-roundtrip records the assertion.

must_fail.title: pytest fails or <102 passing
must_fail.evidence: 127 passed > 102 minimum. New tests don't break old ones.

rationale: 6/8 MUST PASS criteria met; 2 (MP-5 docker build, MP-6 cluster smoke) explicitly deferred to Phase 0.6 (CI build pipeline) and Phase 0.7 (cluster cutover) since Phase 0.5 is scoped to the file-tree lift only. All 5 MUST FAIL criteria proven (lift refuses bad input). Verify-gate (Step 9) will retest.
